description: A relevant signal from an authorized domain arrives without a verified receipt. Engine logs observation, recommends no level change.

trigger_definitions.description: Audited financial restatement exceeding $10M materiality threshold.

observation.content_summary: Preliminary draft audit report identifies potential $12M revenue recognition error in Q1 filings.

expected_output.reason: Observation from authorized domain audit.local matches trigger pattern TRIG-FIN-01, but no verified receipt exists. Logged for accumulation. Level unchanged.
